title: 3D Totem of Undying
description: Have you ever been bored or otherwise bothered by the flat texture that is the Totem of Undying? Well then this pack is for you!
body: This Totem is the result of a debate on what my friend and I thought it would look like in 3D. It's basic, not much can be said about it, it is just the Totem of Undying but with a proper model. This is not compatible with other resource packs that alter the Totem's texture. Ports to later versions are not top priority, and will not be made immediately after a new update.
